label: 4622, 4623 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 115–232, div. A, title XVII, § 1766(a)132 Stat. 2232Aug. 13, 2018
notes: Section 4623, , , , set forth savings provisions relating to the Export Control Act of 1949 and the Export Administration Act of 1969.Pub. L. 96–72, § 2193 Stat. 535Sept. 29, 1979
Former sections 4622 and 4623 were formerly classified to sections 2419 to 2420 of the former Appendix to this title, respectively, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering.
